2605.23825.title: It's the humans, not the data: Geopolitical bias in LLMs originates in post-training, amplified by the language of the prompt
2605.23825.paper_summary: It has generally been assumed that geopolitical bias in language models originates from the training data used during the pre-training phase. We tested seven open-weight LLM pairs consisting of the base model (pre-training only) and the chat model (pre-training and post-training) from seven labs on a paired-scenario forced-choice probe over 28 country pairs in English, French, and Chinese, and found that geopolitical bias originates in post-training rather than in pre-training. Across seven AI labs, six showed shifts in the direction associated with the country or region of the model developer after post-training. This shift is strongest in Alibaba's Qwen 2.5: while the base is neutral on China-favourability (-0.15 log-odds, p=0.15), the post-trained chat variant is at +2.91 (p<10^-4), an 18x shift in odds. We also observe shifts in biases toward other countries across all models. Additionally, the magnitude of this shift depends on the language used to prompt the model: the French-made Mistral becomes pro-France only under French prompting (FR-EN shift +1.91, p<10^-4). These findings suggest that geopolitical preferences in language models are not simply inherited from large-scale internet data but are actively shaped during post-training, highlighting the need for greater transparency, auditing, and oversight of alignment processes that influence how models represent nations, cultures, and political perspectives.
2605.23825.paper_summary_zh: 一般認為，語言模型中的地緣政治偏見源於預訓練階段使用的訓練數據。我們測試了七對開放權重的 LLM，這些模型由七個實驗室提供，包含基礎模型（僅預訓練）和聊天模型（預訓練和後訓練），在一個針對 28 個國家對的配對情境強制選擇探測中，使用英語、法語和中文，並發現地緣政治偏見源於後訓練而非預訓練。在七個 AI 實驗室中，有六個在後訓練後顯示出與模型開發者所屬國家或地區相關的方向變化。這一變化在阿里巴巴的 Qwen 2.5 中最為明顯：基礎模型對中國的偏好是中立的（-0.15 log-odds，p=0.15），而後訓練的聊天變體則達到 +2.91（p<10^-4），這是賠率的 18 倍變化。我們還觀察到所有模型對其他國家的偏見變化。此外，這一變化的大小取決於用於提示模型的語言：法製的 Mistral 只有在法語提示下才變得親法（FR-EN 變化 +1.91，p<10^-4）。這些發現表明，語言模型中的地緣政治偏好並非僅僅從大規模的互聯網數據中繼承，而是在後訓練期間積極塑造的，突顯了對影響模型如何表現國家、文化和政治觀點的對齊過程需要更大透明度、審計和監督的必要性。
2605.23825.author: Stuart Bladon et.al.
